translations.text: for we only do what our forefathers used to do:
we shall not be punished.’

text_qpc_hafs: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ ١٣٩
text_uthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: They denounced him as a liar, and so We destroyed them. There truly is a sign in this, though most of them do not believe:
your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful.
The people of Thamud, too, called the messengers liars.

text_qpc_hafs: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ صَٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٤٢
text_uthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

translations.text: Their brother Salih said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God?
I am a faithful messenger to you:
be mindful of God and obey me.

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ ١٤٥
text_uthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

translations.text: I ask no reward from you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds.
[Do you think] you will be left secure for ever in what you have here-
gardens, springs,
fields, palm trees laden with fruit-
carving your fine houses from the mountains?
Be mindful of God and obey me:
do not obey those who are given to excess

text_qpc_hafs: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُونَ ١٥٢
text_uthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ

translations.text: and who spread corruption in the land instead of doing what is right.’
They said, ‘You are bewitched!

text_qpc_hafs: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا فَأۡتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ ١٥٤
text_uthmani: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ

translations.text: You are nothing but a man like us. Show us a sign, if you are telling the truth.’

text_qpc_hafs: قَالَ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٞ لَّهَا شِرۡبٞ وَلَكُمۡ شِرۡبُ يَوۡمٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ ١٥٥
text_uthmani: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ

translations.text: He said, ��Here is a camel. She should have her turn to drink and so should you, each on a specified day,

text_qpc_hafs: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٖ فَيَأۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ ١٥٦
text_uthmani: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ

translations.text: so do not harm her, or the punishment of a terrible day will befall you.’
But they hamstrung her. In the morning they had cause to regret it:

text_qpc_hafs: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ ١٥٨
text_uthmani: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: the punishment fell upon them. There truly is a sign in this, though most of them will not believe:
your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful.
